title: The homeroom kids moms
wikitext:
[]: The homeroom kid's moms             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Mar 29, 2013 5:48 am One thing that bothers me about Toji's arc is how he was chosen. I mean, its highly implied that Toji, Kensuke and Hikari's mother abandoned them to become spare souls for the Evas therefore abandoning their children by suicide or mental suicide(by going insane like Asuka's mom did). Its implied that Kensuke never grew up with his mom while Hikari and Toji have little siblings but they're mom has left somewhat after they were born(it was never implied they had stepmoms). Did they view the same horrors Asuka did? I assume it was voluntary since Toji's parents and Kensuke's parents work at Nerv in someway. It odd how something like this is scoffed off. We never hear of the spare moms again until EoE where its implied that the Mass Production Evas contain other spare moms. However, I'm not sure if the Evas require children or really depressed children. Toji's troubles seem to steam from his loss of his sister who is alive, but he sees less of her. Is Toji's troubles really that bad because I'm pretty sure there are other kids who can be much more damaged. I think they need really depressed kids because they said Rei was worse than they thought which also mean they assume Rei has some kind of depression. Is there any more info on this? also, I don't think Unit 03's soul is Toji's sister because the dialogue implies it was his Moms making no mention of her mental state.

[]: Re: The homeroom kid's moms             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Mar 29, 2013 9:58 am SimplyMason0 wrote: One thing that bothers me about Toji's arc is how he was chosen. I mean, its highly implied that Toji, Kensuke and Hikari's mother abandoned them to become spare souls for the Evas therefore abandoning their children by suicide or mental suicide(by going insane like Asuka's mom did).

[]:             Quote Post by Elect G-Max » Fri Mar 29, 2013 3:51 pm If the Harpies use Kaworu-based plugs and Kaworu can sync with any damn Eva he wants to regardless of whose soul is inside, then there's no reason to believe that the Harpies contain anyone's souls at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Mar 29, 2013 4:25 pm Elect G-Max wrote: If the Harpies use Kaworu-based plugs and Kaworu can sync with any damn Eva he wants to regardless of whose soul is inside , then there's no reason to believe that the Harpies contain anyone's souls at all.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Mar 29, 2013 4:38 pm Though he does say that he can sync with Eva-2 because the soul is dormant. This suggests that the wrong soul, if not dormant, might have blocked him.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Mar 29, 2013 7:45 pm IIRC, Kaworu said he can synchronize with any soulless EVA, and with EVA-02 because it's soul has shut itself, so it was as if it didn't have a soul. From here if a soul is only needed to enable the synchronization between the pilot and the EVA, and not for powering up the core, I really don't see why SEELE would have bothered with putting souls in the MP-EVA's cores.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Mar 29, 2013 7:56 pm You can't sync with an Eva that has no soul, and, once again, the dummy plugs aren't Kaworu. The MPEs needed souls to work.

[]: Re: The homeroom kid's moms             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Mar 29, 2013 8:26 pm Bagheera wrote: It's implied that they died. I'm not seeing anything there suggesting they abandoned their kids, to say nothing of suicide. AFAICT it's not something that was ever "scoffed off" either.

[]: Re: The homeroom kid's moms             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Mar 29, 2013 8:48 pm SimplyMason0 wrote: The reason I said that was because Toji and Kensukes parents worked at Nerv. Since the Evas uses souls of the pilots mother and Asuka's mom volunteer to do the experiment. I thought it happened to them like with Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sat Apr 06, 2013 9:57 am With regards to the souls of the Mass Production Evangelions, I like the theory that the MP Evas actually contain the souls of Shinji's classmates, so Kensuke, Touji, Hikari and the other unnamed classmates. This could explain why they are so bloodthirsty and insane; presumably they would have had their souls uploaded against their will, so their last moments would have been hideous ones. Also, whereas most of the Evangelion's souls were of adults (the pilot's mothers) the souls of the MP Evas (if they were Shinji's classmates) would have been of children, which no doubt would have severely damaged the Eva's psyches.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 06, 2013 10:32 am Squigsquasher wrote: With regards to the souls of the Mass Production Evangelions, I like the theory that the MP Evas actually contain the souls of Shinji's classmates, so Kensuke, Touji, Hikari and the other unnamed classmates.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sat Apr 06, 2013 10:35 am Bagheera wrote: People like it, but it's not really a defensible theory. There's just no reason to do it. But that would apply to any children anywhere, so why bother with this particular group? Seele's a bunch of religious fanatics, not mustache-twirling villains, so doing it just to be evil doesn't really work.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 06, 2013 10:52 am Squigsquasher wrote: Oh, I'm not saying they did it "for teh evulz", rather that they did it: A: Because they were running out of people to upload, so just used the schoolchildren as a source of souls that nobody was going to miss, And B: Because they were deliberately trying to create murderous killing machines, and having the residing souls being totally insane would help with that.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sat Apr 06, 2013 10:54 am Meh. I dunno. 'Twas just a theory.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Apr 06, 2013 11:06 am Squigsquasher wrote: With regards to the souls of the Mass Production Evangelions, I like the theory that the MP Evas actually contain the souls of Shinji's classmates, so Kensuke, Touji, Hikari and the other unnamed classmates. This could explain why they are so bloodthirsty and insane; presumably they would have had their souls uploaded against their will, so their last moments would have been hideous ones. Also, whereas most of the Evangelion's souls were of adults (the pilot's mothers) the souls of the MP Evas (if they were Shinji's classmates) would have been of children, which no doubt would have severely damaged the Eva's psyches.
